base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_walk — a character from 1986 castlevania. step-forward (left leg fwd) / passing / step-forward (right leg fwd). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame walk cycle — step-forward (left leg fwd) / passing / step-forward (right leg fwd); slow deliberate pace matches character's stiff movement. Facing right on sheet; mirrored in-engine for left
